name: caesar-ai-scan
description: Static-analysis CLI and CI/CD tool to inventory AI dependencies, framework usage, vector DBs, and credentials.

scripts.scan:sample: node src/cli.mjs fixtures/sample-ai-project --format json --out tmp/sample-scan-result.json --export-evidence-candidates tmp/sample-evidence-candidates.json
scripts.check:all-offline: npm run check:syntax && npm run scan:sample && npm run validate:samples

author: Caesar AI Governance Ecosystem
